title: Spring Boot E-commerce API
excerpt: API E-commerce lengkap dan terintegrasi yang dibangun dengan Java 21, Spring Boot, Spring Security & JWT, PostgreSQL, dan didokumentasikan menggunakan Swagger OpenAPI.

This allows the system to be ",n(i.strong,{children:"scalable"})," as the number of users, products, and transactions grows significantly."]}),"
",a(i.p,{children:["All critical data—from user details and product catalogs to transaction records—is stored consistently in a database, making this platform a ",n(i.strong,{children:"reliable, secure, and production-ready"})," foundation for modern e-commerce applications."]}),"

"]}),"

"]}),"

excerpt: Decentralized financial orchestration platform optimized for extreme reliability, horizontal scalability, and real-time observability with AI security and ClickHouse analytics.

title: Distributed Modular Monolith E-commerce Platform
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith E-commerce Platform built with Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.
body:
const{Fragment:n,jsx:a,jsxs:e}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return e(n,{children:[a(r.h1,{id:"-distributed-modular-monolith-ecommerce",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-distributed-modular-monolith-ecommerce",children:"✨ Distributed Modular Monolith Ecommerce"})}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini adalah ",a(r.strong,{children:"implementasi backend untuk platform e-commerce"}),", yang dirancang menggunakan ",a(r.strong,{children:"Arsitektur Monolit Modular"}),". Arsitektur ini mengikuti model penerapan monolitik tetapi dengan pemisahan kepentingan yang jelas antara berbagai ",a(r.strong,{children:"domain bisnis"})," seperti Pengguna, Pedagang, Produk, Pesanan, Transaksi, dan Ulasan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Dengan mengadopsi pendekatan monolit modular, sistem tetap ",a(r.strong,{children:"terstruktur, dapat dipelihara, dan konsisten"}),", sambil juga membuka pintu untuk ",a(r.strong,{children:"evolusi potensial menuju layanan mikro"})," di masa depan jika skalabilitas yang lebih tinggi diperlukan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Komunikasi antar modul di dalam monolit ditangani secara internal melalui ",a(r.strong,{children:"panggilan fungsi langsung/batas domain"}),", sementara interaksi eksternal (seperti antara API Gateway dan server utama atau dengan cache/broker pesan) ditangani menggunakan ",a(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," dan ",a(r.strong,{children:"REST API"}),". Persistensi data dikelola melalui ",a(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"})," sebagai basis data utama, dengan ",a(r.strong,{children:"Redis"})," untuk caching dan ",a(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," sebagai broker pesan berbasis peristiwa."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Selain fungsionalitas bisnis, proyek ini dilengkapi dengan ",a(r.strong,{children:"tumpukan observabilitas modern"})," (Prometheus, Loki, Grafana, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), yang memungkinkan visibilitas penuh ke dalam metrik, log, dan jejak terdistribusi. Ini memastikan debugging yang lebih baik, pemantauan kinerja, dan keandalan operasional."]}),"
",a(r.hr,{}),"
",a(r.h3,{id:"-fitur-utama",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-fitur-utama",children:"🎯 Fitur Utama"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"🔐 Otentikasi & Manajemen Pengguna"}),"
Mendukung pendaftaran pengguna, login, token penyegaran, dan otorisasi berbasis peran menggunakan ",a(r.strong,{children:"JWT"}),"."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"🏬 Manajemen Pedagang"}),"
Pedagang dapat membuat dan mengelola toko mereka, termasuk detail bisnis, kebijakan, dokumen verifikasi, dan penghargaan."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"📦 Manajemen Produk & Inventaris"}),"
CRUD penuh untuk produk dan kategori, termasuk pelacakan stok, penetapan harga, deskripsi, dan kategorisasi produk."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"🛒 Keranjang Belanja & Manajemen Pesanan"}),"
Pelanggan dapat menambahkan item ke keranjang mereka, melanjutkan ke checkout, dan menghasilkan pesanan resmi. Pesanan ditautkan dengan produk, item, dan pedagang."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"💳 Pemrosesan Transaksi & Pembayaran"}),"
Sistem mencatat transaksi, menangani status pembayaran, dan dapat memicu acara konfirmasi untuk layanan lain (misalnya, pemberitahuan email)."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"⭐ Ulasan Produk"}),"
Pelanggan dapat mengirimkan ulasan dan peringkat setelah menyelesaikan pembelian, meningkatkan interaktivitas dan kepercayaan platform."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"📧 Integrasi Eksternal"}),"
Acara seperti konfirmasi pedagang, verifikasi akun, dan pembaruan transaksi dapat memicu ",a(r.strong,{children:"Layanan Email"})," untuk pemberitahuan."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["

"]}),"
"]}),"

",e(r.ul,{children:["

",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Lingkungan Docker"}),"
Diatur melalui ",a(r.code,{children:"docker-compose"}),", termasuk API Gateway (NGINX), layanan inti, Redis, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Layanan Email, dan tumpukan observabilitas. Ideal untuk penyiapan pengembangan lokal yang cepat dan konsisten."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Lingkungan Kubernetes"}),"
Diterapkan di bawah namespace khusus (",a(r.code,{children:"ecommerce"}),"). Setiap layanan berjalan di Pod-nya sendiri dengan penskalaan otomatis opsional menggunakan ",a(r.strong,{children:"HPA"}),". Infrastruktur inti mencakup Kafka (dengan Zookeeper), Redis Cluster, dan PostgreSQL. Komponen observabilitas berjalan sebagai Pod/DaemonSet, memastikan log, metrik, dan jejak dikumpulkan dan divisualisasikan."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.h2,{id:"️-teknologi-yang-digunakan",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#️-teknologi-yang-digunakan",children:"🛠️ Teknologi yang Digunakan"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["🚀 ",a(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," — Menyediakan API berkinerja tinggi dan bertipe kuat."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📡 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," — Digunakan untuk mempublikasikan acara terkait saldo (misalnya, setelah pembuatan kartu)."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📈 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Prometheus"})," — Mengumpulkan metrik seperti jumlah permintaan dan latensi untuk setiap metode RPC."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🛰️ ",a(r.strong,{children:"OpenTelemetry (OTel)"})," — Memungkinkan pelacakan terdistribusi untuk observabilitas."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🦫 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"})," — Bahasa implementasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🌐 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Echo"})," — Kerangka kerja HTTP untuk Go."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🪵 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Zap Logger"})," — Pencatatan terstruktur untuk debugging dan operasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📦 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Sqlc"})," — Generator kode SQL untuk Go."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧳 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Goose"})," — Alat migrasi basis data."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🐳 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Docker"})," — Alat kontainerisasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧱 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Docker Compose"})," — Menyederhanakan kontainerisasi untuk lingkungan pengembangan dan produksi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🐘 ",a(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"})," — Basis data relasional untuk menyimpan data pengguna."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📃 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Swago"})," — Generator dokumentasi API."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧭 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Zookeeper"})," — Manajemen konfigurasi terdistribusi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔀 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Nginx"})," — Proksi terbalik untuk lalu lintas HTTP."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔍 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Jaeger"})," — Pelacakan terdistribusi untuk observabilitas."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📊 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Grafana"})," — Alat pemantauan dan visualisasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧪 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Postman"})," — Klien API untuk menguji dan men-debug titik akhir."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["☸️ ",a(r.strong,{children:"Kubernetes"})," — Platform orkestrasi kontainer untuk penerapan, penskalaan, dan manajemen."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧰 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Redis"})," — Penyimpanan nilai kunci dalam memori yang digunakan untuk caching dan akses data cepat."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📥 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Loki"})," — Sistem agregasi log untuk mengumpulkan dan menanyakan log."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📤 ",a(r.strong,{children:"Promtail"})," — Agen pengiriman log yang mengirim log ke Loki."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔧 ",a(r.strong,{children:"OTel Collector"})," — Kolektor agnostik vendor untuk menerima, memproses, dan mengekspor data telemetri (metrik, jejak, log)."]}),"

",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Caching (Redis)"}),": Redis digunakan sebagai cache dalam memori untuk menyimpan data yang sering diakses, mengurangi beban basis data dan meningkatkan waktu respons."]}),"

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway - GraphQL
excerpt: Implementasi backend aman, modular, dan dapat diskalakan untuk pemrosesan transaksi keuangan menggunakan GraphQL API Gateway, gRPC, Go, Kafka, dan PostgreSQL.
body:
const{Fragment:n,jsx:a,jsxs:e}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(l){const i={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...l.components};return e(n,{children:[a(i.h1,{id:"distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway",children:a(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway",children:"Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway"})}),"
",e(i.p,{children:["Proyek ini adalah ",a(i.strong,{children:"Implementasi Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway"})," dari ",a(i.strong,{children:"Sistem Gerbang Pembayaran"}),". Arsitektur ini dirancang untuk menyediakan ",a(i.strong,{children:"backend yang aman, dapat diskalakan, dan modular"})," untuk menangani transaksi keuangan, pembayaran merchant, operasi kartu, dan alur penyelesaian."]}),"
",e(i.p,{children:["Tidak seperti monolit tradisional, sistem ini disusun menjadi ",a(i.strong,{children:"modul (layanan) yang terdefinisi dengan baik"})," seperti Auth, Pengguna, Peran, Kartu, Saldo, Transaksi, Merchant, Transfer, Isi Ulang, Tarik Tunai, dll. Setiap modul berkomunikasi secara internal melalui ",a(i.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," dan secara eksternal melalui ",a(i.strong,{children:"GraphQL API Gateway"}),". Peristiwa dipublikasikan melalui ",a(i.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," untuk alur kerja asinkron yang digerakkan oleh peristiwa (misalnya, penyelesaian, notifikasi email, pembaruan saldo)."]}),"
",a(i.p,{children:"Di lapisan infrastruktur, sistem terintegrasi dengan:"}),"
",e(i.ul,{children:["
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"})," sebagai basis data relasional inti."]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"Redis"})," untuk caching dan manajemen sesi waktu nyata."]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," (dengan Zookeeper) sebagai bus acara untuk pemrosesan asinkron."]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"Layanan Email"})," untuk mengirim konfirmasi, penyelesaian, dan notifikasi transaksional."]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"Tumpukan Observabilitas"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry) untuk pemantauan, pencatatan, dan pelacakan di seluruh ekosistem."]}),"
"]}),"
",a(i.p,{children:"Penerapan dapat dijalankan di:"}),"
",e(i.ul,{children:["
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"Docker Compose"})," untuk pengembangan dan pengujian lokal yang lengkap."]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:[a(i.strong,{children:"Kubernetes"})," untuk lingkungan tingkat produksi dengan penskalaan otomatis dan ketahanan."]}),"
"]}),"
",a(i.hr,{}),"

",e(i.ul,{children:["
",e(i.li,{children:["

",a(i.li,{children:"Kontrol akses berbasis peran (admin, merchant, pelanggan, sistem)."}),"
",a(i.li,{children:"Izin disimpan di Redis untuk pencarian cepat."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:["

",e(i.ul,{children:["
",a(i.li,{children:"Pendaftaran kartu dan manajemen siklus hidup."}),"
",a(i.li,{children:"Pembaruan saldo otomatis yang dipicu oleh peristiwa kartu."}),"
",a(i.li,{children:"Layanan saldo memastikan status akun yang konsisten."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:["
",a(i.p,{children:a(i.strong,{children:"Pemrosesan Transaksi"})}),"

"]}),"
"]}),"

",a(i.li,{children:"Layanan penarikan untuk pembayaran kepada merchant atau pelanggan."}),"
",a(i.li,{children:"Setiap operasi menghasilkan konfirmasi email berbasis peristiwa."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"

"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:["

",a(i.li,{children:"Cache Redis menyimpan data yang sering diakses (izin, sesi, saldo)."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(i.li,{children:["

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway built with Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.

body:
const{Fragment:a,jsx:n,jsxs:e}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return e(a,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"-distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway",children:"💳 Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway"})}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini adalah ",n(r.strong,{children:"Implementasi Distribute Modular Monolith Payment Gateway"})," dari ",n(r.strong,{children:"Sistem Gerbang Pembayaran"}),". Arsitektur ini dirancang untuk menyediakan ",n(r.strong,{children:"backend yang aman, dapat diskalakan, dan modular"})," untuk menangani transaksi keuangan, pembayaran merchant, operasi kartu, dan alur penyelesaian."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Tidak seperti monolit tradisional, sistem ini disusun menjadi ",n(r.strong,{children:"modul (layanan) yang terdefinisi dengan baik"})," seperti ",n(r.strong,{children:"Auth, Pengguna, Peran, Kartu, Saldo, Transaksi, Merchant, Transfer, Isi Ulang, Tarik Tunai"}),", dll. Setiap modul berkomunikasi secara internal melalui ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," dan secara eksternal melalui ",n(r.strong,{children:"API Gateway (NGINX)"}),". Peristiwa dipublikasikan melalui ",n(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," untuk alur kerja asinkron yang digerakkan oleh peristiwa (misalnya, penyelesaian, notifikasi email, pembaruan saldo)."]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Di lapisan infrastruktur, sistem terintegrasi dengan:"}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"})," sebagai basis data relasional inti."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Redis"})," untuk caching dan manajemen sesi waktu nyata."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," (dengan Zookeeper) sebagai bus acara untuk pemrosesan asinkron."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Layanan Email"})," untuk mengirim konfirmasi, penyelesaian, dan notifikasi transaksional."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Tumpukan Observabilitas"})," (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry) untuk pemantauan, pencatatan, dan pelacakan di seluruh ekosistem."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Penerapan dapat dijalankan di:"}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Docker Compose"})," untuk pengembangan dan pengujian lokal yang lengkap."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Kubernetes"})," untuk lingkungan tingkat produksi dengan penskalaan otomatis dan ketahanan."]}),"
"]}),"

",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["

",n(r.li,{children:"Otentikasi pengguna yang aman dengan JWT."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Kontrol akses berbasis peran (admin, merchant, pelanggan, sistem)."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Izin disimpan di Redis untuk pencarian cepat."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["

",n(r.li,{children:"Pendaftaran kartu dan manajemen siklus hidup."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Pembaruan saldo otomatis yang dipicu oleh peristiwa kartu."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Layanan saldo memastikan status akun yang konsisten."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.strong,{children:"🏦 Pemrosesan Transaksi"})}),"

",e(r.li,{children:["Dukungan penuh untuk ",n(r.strong,{children:"transaksi pembayaran"}),", termasuk pembuatan, penyelesaian, pengembalian dana."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Peristiwa transaksi dipublikasikan ke Kafka untuk layanan hilir."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Konfirmasi transaksi waktu nyata dikirim melalui email."}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["

",e(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Setiap layanan inti berjalan di Pod-nya sendiri di dalam kluster."}),"

",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["🚀 ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," — Menyediakan API berkinerja tinggi dan bertipe kuat."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📡 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," — Digunakan untuk mempublikasikan peristiwa terkait saldo (misalnya, setelah pembuatan kartu)."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📈 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Prometheus"})," — Mengumpulkan metrik seperti jumlah permintaan dan latensi untuk setiap metode RPC."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🛰️ ",n(r.strong,{children:"OpenTelemetry (OTel)"})," — Memungkinkan pelacakan terdistribusi untuk observabilitas."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🦫 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"})," — Bahasa implementasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🌐 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Echo"})," — Kerangka kerja HTTP untuk Go."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🪵 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Zap Logger"})," — Pencatatan terstruktur untuk debugging dan operasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📦 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Sqlc"})," — Generator kode SQL untuk Go."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧳 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Goose"})," — Alat migrasi basis data."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🐳 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Docker"})," — Alat kontainerisasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧱 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Docker Compose"})," — Menyederhanakan kontainerisasi untuk lingkungan pengembangan dan produksi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🐘 ",n(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"})," — Basis data relasional untuk menyimpan data pengguna."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📃 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Swago"})," — Generator dokumentasi API."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧭 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Zookeeper"})," — Manajemen konfigurasi terdistribusi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔀 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Nginx"})," — Proksi terbalik untuk lalu lintas HTTP."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔍 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Jaeger"})," — Pelacakan terdistribusi untuk observabilitas."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📊 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Grafana"})," — Alat pemantauan dan visualisasi."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧪 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Postman"})," — Klien API untuk menguji dan men-debug endpoint."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["☸️ ",n(r.strong,{children:"Kubernetes"})," — Platform orkestrasi kontainer untuk penerapan, penskalaan, dan manajemen."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🧰 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Redis"})," — Penyimpanan nilai kunci dalam memori yang digunakan untuk caching dan akses data cepat."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📥 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Loki"})," — Sistem agregasi log untuk mengumpulkan dan menanyakan log."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["📤 ",n(r.strong,{children:"Promtail"})," — Agen pengiriman log yang mengirim log ke Loki."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🔧 ",n(r.strong,{children:"OTel Collector"})," — Kolektor agnostik vendor untuk menerima, memproses, dan mengekspor data telemetri (metrik, jejak, log)."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["🖥️ ",n(r.strong,{children:"Node Exporter"})," — Mengekspos metrik tingkat sistem (host) seperti CPU, memori, disk, dan statistik jaringan untuk Prometheus."]}),"
"]}),"

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Rust
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway Platform built with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL

const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const l={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...i.components};return r(e,{children:[n(l.h1,{id:"distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway-in-rust",children:n(l.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-monolith-payment-gateway-in-rust",children:"Distributed Modular Monolith Payment Gateway in Rust"})}),"
",n(l.p,{children:"A production-ready payment gateway platform implementing a modular monolith architecture, built with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and React."}),"
",n(l.p,{children:n(l.img,{src:"/portofolio/distributed-modular-monolith-paymentgateway-rust_1.png",alt:"Payment Gateway Dashboard"})}),"

",n(l.p,{children:"This project demonstrates a comprehensive payment gateway system designed to simulate digital financial transactions. Built with a modular monolith architecture, the system separates business domains (users, balances, transactions) into independent modules within a single codebase. Inter-module communication is efficiently handled through gRPC."}),"
",n(l.p,{children:"The primary goal is to provide a real-world example of modern architecture implementation in the Rust ecosystem, complete with a backend, frontend dashboard, and desktop application version."}),"
",n(l.h2,{id:"key-features",children:n(l.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features",children:"Key Features"})}),"
",r(l.ul,{children:["
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"User Management & JWT Authentication"}),": Secure registration, login, and session management"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)"}),": Feature access restriction based on user roles"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Digital Wallet Management"}),": Balance top-up and utilization for transactions"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Financial Transactions"}),":","
",r(l.ul,{children:["
",n(l.li,{children:"Top-up from external sources"}),"
",n(l.li,{children:"Peer-to-peer transfers"}),"
",n(l.li,{children:"Withdrawal to external accounts"}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Payment Card Management"}),": Users can link and manage payment cards"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Administrative Dashboard"}),": Interface for monitoring and managing system activities"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[n(l.strong,{children:"Inter-Service Communication"}),": Efficient, type-safe communication via gRPC"]}),"
"]}),"

",n(l.p,{children:"The system is designed as a modular monolith. Although contained within a single repository, it consists of several services (crates) that communicate with each other through gRPC. This design provides clear separation of concerns while simplifying deployment and development compared to a full microservices architecture."}),"
",r(l.p,{children:["The ",n(l.code,{children:"APIGateway"})," serves as the single entry point for all external HTTP requests. It handles request authentication and forwards them to the appropriate internal services via gRPC. All services share a single PostgreSQL database."]}),"

title: Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale built with Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and Kafka with full observability stack.

toc.title: ✨ Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale

body:
const{Fragment:n,jsx:a,jsxs:e}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return e(n,{children:[a(r.h1,{id:"-distributed-modular-monolith-point-of-sale",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-distributed-modular-monolith-point-of-sale",children:"✨ Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale"})}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini adalah ",a(r.strong,{children:"Implementasi Distributed Modular Monolith Point Of Sale"})," dari ",a(r.strong,{children:"Sistem Point of Sale (POS)"}),". Prinsip desain intinya adalah mempertahankan ",a(r.strong,{children:"pemisahan modular"})," (otentikasi, pengguna, merchant, produk, transaksi, dll.) sambil tetap di-deploy sebagai ",a(r.strong,{children:"monolit tunggal"})," untuk kesederhanaan operasional."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Tidak seperti monolit tradisional, implementasi ini mengadopsi ",a(r.strong,{children:"struktur modular dengan batasan domain yang jelas"})," dan memanfaatkan ",a(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," untuk komunikasi internal antar-layanan. Hal ini memungkinkan arsitektur untuk diskalakan seperti layanan mikro tetapi tanpa kompleksitas mengelola sistem yang sepenuhnya terdistribusi di awal. Seiring waktu, setiap modul dapat diekstraksi menjadi layanan mikro independennya sendiri jika diperlukan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Sistem ini dirancang untuk menangani ",a(r.strong,{children:"operasi POS dalam skala besar"}),", termasuk otentikasi, akses berbasis peran, manajemen merchant, pelacakan inventaris, operasi kasir, pemrosesan pesanan, dan penanganan pembayaran."]}),"
",a(r.p,{children:"Di tingkat infrastruktur, proyek ini terintegrasi dengan:"}),"

",a(r.p,{children:a(r.a,{href:"https://mermaid.live/edit#pako:eNqNV9tu4zYQ_RVBiy1awE4iWb5p2wCpvUjT3U28SQoUbYqCEke2EFkyKCqXJvn3ktSNIinHfrHIc2Y4PDPSkC92mGGwfTtKssdwgwi1bpd3qcV-Hz9avxh_DfylCICkQCG3FkmRUyAHWeZFsCZot7G-zPK_72yDF_ufu7TkVu7OVhfWOaLwiJ7b-cvzi8s_mQMJ_Dkgx6diXvexurqxltkWxal1A-QhDiFv8QWzX2fkuUKY13qmJguHNf06S6Cl8pGRtiIZLkLaMqsJI_mKYCAXFLYtXUxZfM5osUD5JgYixywmjOSzgm5aJh91aB2pFhkBg0hN4jj-b43zdTt8eVX--waEVVYqyVDPGAPlvz9yeVt81EsVGqmS9ZFvCUpzFNI4S1sTadJoCClW9LlII4KsobVEFAUoB4NENcT8NyxNmJhxu7E0U71bWGU5XRO4-f6V11MzeNe5NRyeSsaHbG-Bwg1YP1jfCyikPV4DjnnWxb9SPO27jaJ7dENReM9fcT6wxEiLU2A1R0P_yrJ7gB0Qxmie-1lik6WnPfu7ClhBPaAgTmL6bIi9g_Oaksc922Bv9paiOClfcvGocS7Zp_bz0y4jVOyHD616bNZFYpca9tK_ZvcxY_E_Y2xAN1DkVXTlQH-VKCSLLEkgpBlfko-tZkKjnxMUoZTnrnrSGL8jWIvgywelVmTZROJE8L2KlQXcRt-v1l5mO9-zpkLoiLJHL0GuhXiHVsnRLVGlVt9vv7_d3q6OpebHUpWmIL5j-UE-RKMUASntT4WldqdC3RanompP09eVO5iKSi1LhZSeosJS_zCG1IPp7UHKxucHSGlu_YhZzIB_KuclZazh0fD0VZwFVkC2cZ7zz7iwetW3Ik2UhqIjN42xMjNu02wqmmRlpm1f8VOaSV2Y0gS20K5rEkJttqWTst-uUIyPryEqUgx4n5NGTdE89IpVCrGsPtFndLm7ULcQVVQtRBXvFqKKdhTvQpqyXVjKhDGkHkyXTma0B3DREzQRS22VVlhy-6q8yzCWXQt3yqsJZvnrYelUzyBqTlXckFiVYsyuSjKkWKWoeVZxU7JVjppxY6z7CD25l2mN5t-AkjjMxbEgLwj0qM5f1ONtyX3VOqP2DeunqrnYz9bTsp-vZmg_W_sM9lONn79-eieFB2zxQK4pse9kpnyR95Oq97KfdOh5YpGgPLeWEMVpfPghIuRWzMjCEKEioVYUJ4n_wQEHXBjklLCjuf9hNg-8CA3CLMmI_yHEeBJ5FTh8jDHd-M7u6ZPiMeTXytLdyBm5nte4CwM0iaa1u2gMJzgcRFlKh48QrzfUD7IEq-5ica0p_blzd-y2_iIUjGatPwyTGVLNsyCv94ZcOBk3xmgCI-TUxngezefa2uw4EDbKjNAM9SgTRDiIQLVeVwe82oE7HwWNg7kHLh43sZ9EmLkzaNFk84ydTNZpme76ei-Wqk5C1WpyEN0bv0hMB66vuKXGHUjU8KC9Dhoo3fsV07mDahdZruUne2CvSYxtP0JJDgN7y45ciI_tF258Z7Pi37Lbs88eMSLswnaXvjGjHUrZbXFr-5QUzIxkxXrTOCl2mO19GSO2Ykthh3Igi6xIqe07U-HC9l_sJzYazY88dzpxnLE3nU7c-cB-tv3h2Dsaj73JbOLNplPXc9zJ28D-T6zqHLkz54RNjyfOeDJ3He_tf82_J1k",children:a(r.img,{src:"https://mermaid.ink/img/pako:eNqNV9tu4zYQ_RVBiy1awE4iWb5p2wCpvUjT3U28SQoUbYqCEke2EFkyKCqXJvn3ktSNIinHfrHIc2Y4PDPSkC92mGGwfTtKssdwgwi1bpd3qcV-Hz9avxh_DfylCICkQCG3FkmRUyAHWeZFsCZot7G-zPK_72yDF_ufu7TkVu7OVhfWOaLwi ",a(r.h3,{id:"komponen-inti",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#komponen-inti",children:"Komponen Inti"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"API Gateway"}),": Titik masuk tunggal untuk semua lalu lintas HTTP yang masuk dari klien. Ini bertanggung jawab untuk validasi permintaan, otentikasi, dan merutekan permintaan ke modul layanan hilir yang sesuai melalui gRPC."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Modul Layanan"}),": Logika bisnis inti dienkapsulasi dalam modul-modul yang berbeda (misalnya, ",a(r.code,{children:"User"}),", ",a(r.code,{children:"Product"}),", ",a(r.code,{children:"Cart"}),", ",a(r.code,{children:"Order"}),"). Meskipun dikemas dalam satu biner, mereka berjalan sebagai proses terpisah di lingkungan terdistribusi, memastikan isolasi kesalahan dan skalabilitas independen."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Komunikasi"}),":"]}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Sinkron (gRPC)"}),": Komunikasi berkinerja tinggi dan latensi rendah antara API Gateway dan layanan internal dicapai menggunakan gRPC."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Asinkron (Kafka)"}),": Untuk memisahkan layanan dan menangani alur kerja berbasis peristiwa, platform ini menggunakan Kafka. Misalnya, ketika pesanan dibuat, peristiwa ",a(r.code,{children:"order_created"})," dapat dipublikasikan, yang dapat dilanggani oleh layanan lain tanpa membuat ketergantungan langsung."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.h3,{id:"data-dan-caching",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#data-dan-caching",children:"Data dan Caching"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Database (PostgreSQL)"}),": Database PostgreSQL pusat menyimpan data inti untuk aplikasi. Setiap modul layanan bertanggung jawab atas skemanya sendiri dalam database ini."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Caching (Redis)"}),": Redis digunakan sebagai cache dalam memori untuk menyimpan data yang sering diakses, mengurangi beban database dan meningkatkan waktu respons."]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.h3,{id:"observability",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#observability",children:"Observability"})}),"
",a(r.p,{children:"Platform ini memiliki tumpukan observability tingkat produksi yang komprehensif yang dibangun di atas tiga pilar observability:"}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Logging (Loki & Promtail)"}),": Semua layanan menghasilkan log terstruktur. Promtail mengumpulkan log-log ini dan meneruskannya ke Loki, sistem agregasi log pusat, yang memungkinkan kueri dan analisis yang kuat."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Metrik (Prometheus & Grafana)"}),": Setiap layanan mengekspos metrik terperinci (misalnya, tingkat permintaan, kesalahan, latensi). Prometheus mengikis dan menyimpan metrik-metrik ini, sementara Grafana menyediakan dasbor yang kaya dan interaktif untuk visualisasi dan pemantauan."]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.strong,{children:"Tracing (Jaeger & OpenTelemetry)"}),": Untuk memahami alur permintaan di berbagai layanan, sistem ini diinstrumentasi dengan OpenTelemetry untuk pelacakan terdistribusi. Jejak dikirim ke Jaeger, memungkinkan pengembang untuk memvisualisasikan grafik panggilan, mengidentifikasi hambatan kinerja, dan men-debug masalah di lingkungan terdistribusi."]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.h2,{id:"makefile",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#makefile",children:"Makefile"})}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini dilengkapi dengan ",a(r.code,{children:"Makefile"})," yang berisi berbagai perintah untuk memfasilitasi pengembangan. Berikut adalah beberapa perintah yang tersedia:"]}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make migrate"}),": Menjalankan migrasi database"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make migrate-down"}),": Mengembalikan migrasi database"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make generate-proto"}),": Menghasilkan kode Go dari file ",a(r.code,{children:".proto"})]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make generate-sql"}),": Menghasilkan kode Go dari file SQL"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make generate-swagger"}),": Menghasilkan dokumentasi Swagger"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make seeder"}),": Mengisi database dengan data awal"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make build-image"}),": Membangun image Docker untuk semua layanan"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make image-load"}),": Memuat image Docker ke Minikube"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make image-delete"}),": Menghapus image Docker dari Minikube"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make ps"}),": Menampilkan status kontainer Docker"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make up"}),": Menjalankan semua layanan dengan Docker Compose"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make down"}),": Menghentikan semua layanan yang berjalan dengan Docker Compose"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make build-up"}),": Membangun image dan menjalankan semua layanan dengan Docker Compose"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make kube-start"}),": Memulai Minikube"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make kube-up"}),": Menjalankan semua layanan di Kubernetes"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make kube-down"}),": Menghentikan semua layanan di Kubernetes"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make kube-status"}),": Menampilkan status pod, layanan, PVC, dan pekerjaan di Kubernetes"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make kube-tunnel"}),": Membuat terowongan ke Minikube"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:[a(r.code,{children:"make test-auth"}),": Menjalankan tes pada layanan ",a(r.code,{children:"auth"})]}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.h2,{id:"-source-code--repository",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-source-code--repository",children:"🔗 Source Code & Repository"})}),"
",a(r.p,{children:a(r.a,{href:"https://github.com/MamangRust/monolith-pointofsale-grpc",children:"📌 View on GitHub"})})]})}return{default:function(n={}){const{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?a(e,{...n,children:a(_createMdxContent,{...n})}):_createMdxContent(n)}};

title: Distributed Modular Monolith – Simple E-commerce
excerpt: A Distributed Modular Monolith – Simple E-commerce with Rust, gRPC, PostgreSQL, and with full observability stack.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:a}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...i.components};return a(e,{children:[n(r.h2,{id:"distributed-modular-monolith--simple-e-commerce",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#distributed-modular-monolith--simple-e-commerce",children:"Distributed Modular Monolith – Simple E-commerce"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Distributed Modular Monolith Simple E-commerce adalah sebuah backend e-commerce modern yang dibangun dengan Rust.
Proyek ini mencoba menggabungkan kesederhanaan monolith dengan fleksibilitas microservices menggunakan pendekatan modular monolith."}),"
",a(r.p,{children:["Artinya, semua layanan dikelola dalam satu ",n(r.strong,{children:"monorepo"}),", tapi dipisahkan dalam bentuk modul/layanan independen (",n(r.code,{children:"auth"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"user"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"role"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"product"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"order"}),", ",n(r.code,{children:"email"}),") yang berkomunikasi lewat gRPC. Dari luar, sistem ini tetap terlihat sebagai satu kesatuan karena ada API Gateway (Axum) yang menyajikan REST API untuk klien."]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-arsitektur-inti",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-arsitektur-inti",children:"⚡ Arsitektur Inti"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Monorepo Modular → semua service dalam satu repo, tapi tetap punya batasan domain yang jelas."}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"API Gateway → menyediakan REST API untuk frontend/mobile, sekaligus load balancer untuk service internal."}),"
"]}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Service-to-Service → komunikasi antar service menggunakan gRPC (Tonic) untuk kecepatan & efisiensi."}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Event Streaming → event penting (misalnya order berhasil) dikirim ke ",n(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"})," lalu diproses oleh service lain (contoh: ",n(r.code,{children:"email worker"}),")."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Observability Lengkap` → tracing, metrics, dan logging sudah siap out-of-the-box dengan OpenTelemetry."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-fitur-utama",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-fitur-utama",children:"🔑 Fitur Utama"})}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"1-manajemen-pengguna--otentikasi",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-manajemen-pengguna--otentikasi",children:["1. ",n(r.strong,{children:"Manajemen Pengguna & Otentikasi"})]})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Registrasi & login dengan JWT Authentication (access + refresh token)."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Verifikasi email & reset password menggunakan token."}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Role-based access control (RBAC) dengan mapping ",n(r.code,{children:"user ↔ role"}),"."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Redis digunakan untuk caching session/token agar lebih cepat."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"2-produk--order",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-produk--order",children:["2. ",n(r.strong,{children:"Produk & Order"})]})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"CRUD produk (nama, harga, stok, dsb)."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Order processing sederhana: pengguna dapat membuat pesanan, sistem otomatis menghitung total harga."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Stok produk otomatis berkurang ketika ada transaksi order."}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Order event dipublish ke ",n(r.strong,{children:"Kafka"}),", lalu dikonsumsi oleh ",n(r.code,{children:"email worker"})," untuk mengirimkan notifikasi."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"3-observability--monitoring",children:a(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-observability--monitoring",children:["3. ",n(r.strong,{children:"Observability & Monitoring"})]})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Tracing → setiap request antar service bisa dilacak dengan Jaeger."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Metrics → performa aplikasi (latensi, throughput, error rate) diekspor ke **Prometheus."}),"
",a(r.li,{children:["Logging → log terstruktur dikirim ke ",n(r.strong,{children:"Loki"})," dan divisualisasikan lewat Grafana."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"OpenTelemetry Collector digunakan sebagai penghubung utama observability stack."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"4-infra--deployment",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-infra--deployment",children:"4. Infra & Deployment"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Database: PostgreSQL (SQLx) untuk data utama."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Caching: Redis untuk session/token."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Message Broker: Kafka untuk event-driven flow."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Containerization: Docker & Docker Compose siap pakai."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Makefile: untuk mempermudah perintah build, run, up/down service."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"sqlx-cli: untuk migrasi database otomatis."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-kelebihan-proyek-ini",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-kelebihan-proyek-ini",children:"🎯 Kelebihan Proyek Ini"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Scalable → bisa dijalankan sebagai monolith (mudah) atau dipisah jadi microservices (besar skala)."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Production-ready → ada autentikasi, logging, monitoring, dan observability lengkap."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Developer-friendly → bisa jalan pakai Docker Compose tanpa setup ribet."}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Belajar lengkap → cocok buat developer yang mau belajar Rust backend dengan ekosistem modern (REST, gRPC, Kafka, OpenTelemetry)."}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.hr,{}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"-panduan-memulai",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-panduan-memulai",children:"🚀 Panduan Memulai"})}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"prasyarat",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#prasyarat",children:"Prasyarat"})}),"
",a(r.ul,{children:["
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.a,{href:"https://www.rust-lang.org/tools/install",children:"Rust"})," (untuk pengembangan lokal)"]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.a,{href:"https://docs.docker.com/get-docker/",children:"Docker"})," dan ",n(r.a,{href:"https://docs.docker.com/compose/install/",children:"Docker Compose"})]}),"
",a(r.li,{children:[n(r.a,{href:"https://github.com/launchbadge/sqlx/tree/main/sqlx-cli",children:"sqlx-cli"})," (untuk migrasi database lokal): ",n(r.code,{children:"cargo install sqlx-cli"})]}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"1-clone-repositori",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-clone-repositori",children:"1. Clone Repositori"})}),"

title: Payment Gateway with Echo and gRPC
excerpt: A system that simulates a payment gateway handling transactions like card payments, top-ups, withdrawals, and transfers.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const i={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...t.components};return r(e,{children:[n(i.h1,{id:"payment-gateway-grpc-project",children:n(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#payment-gateway-grpc-project",children:"Payment Gateway gRPC Project"})}),"
",r(i.p,{children:["This project is a ",n(i.strong,{children:"simple payment system implementation"})," designed to mimic the workflow of a typical digital financial service. The system is built with a modular approach, where each service can operate independently but remains interconnected through a consistent database and API."]}),"
",n(i.h3,{id:"core-features",children:n(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-features",children:"Core Features"})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"The key components that form the core of this project include:"}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🔐 User Authentication"}),"
Supports new account registration, login with credentials, and JWT token issuance and validation. The system also includes refresh token management to maintain user session security."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"💳 Card Management"}),"
Each user can add cards to their account. Card details such as number, card type, expiration date, and CVV are stored securely and can be accessed for transactions."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🏬 Merchant Management"}),"
Merchants can be created and managed through the system. Each merchant has a unique identity in the form of a UUID merchant number and an API key used to process transactions."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"💸 Transactions"}),"
Handles the payment process between a user's card and a merchant. Each transaction is recorded with a unique number, payment amount, and information about the receiving merchant."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🔄 Fund Transfers"}),"
Allows users to transfer balances between cards. The system records the source (from) and destination (to) of the transfer, ensuring sufficient balance before processing the transaction."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"📈 Balance Top-Up"}),"
Users can add funds to their cards through a top-up process. Each top-up has a unique identity and automatically updates the respective card's balance."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"🏧 Withdrawals"}),"
Users can withdraw funds from their cards. Like top-ups, this process is recorded, and the balance is updated according to the withdrawal amount."]}),"
"]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["
",r(i.p,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"💰 Balance Management"}),"
All cards are linked to a balance entity. The system is responsible for tracking, adding, and subtracting balances consistently after every financial operation (transaction, transfer, top-up, or withdrawal)."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"-project-features",children:n(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-project-features",children:"🚀 Project Features"})}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"REST API Client"}),": A RESTful client that interacts with the gRPC server."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"gRPC Server"}),": The main server that handles all business logic."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Database Migration"}),": Uses ",n(i.code,{children:"goose"})," to manage the database schema."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"API Documentation"}),": Automatically generated Swagger documentation."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Docker Support"}),": Docker and Docker Compose configurations for an easy development environment."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Unit & Integration Tests"}),": Testing to ensure code reliability."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"CI/CD"}),": GitHub Actions workflows for automated builds, formatting, and testing."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"-technology-stack",children:n(i.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-technology-stack",children:"🧰 Technology Stack"})}),"
",r(i.ul,{children:["
",r(i.li,{children:["🐹 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Go (Golang)"})," — Implementation language."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["🌐 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Echo"})," — A minimalist web framework for building REST APIs."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["🪵 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Zap Logger"})," — Structured logging for high-performance applications."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["📦 ",n(i.strong,{children:"SQLC"})," — Generates type-safe Go code from SQL queries."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["🚀 ",n(i.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," — High-performance RPC for internal service communication."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["🧳 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Goose"})," — A migration tool for managing database schema changes."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["🐳 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Docker"})," — A containerization platform for consistent development environments."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["📄 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Swago"})," — Generates Swagger 2.0 documentation for Echo routes."]}),"
",r(i.li,{children:["🔗 ",n(i.strong,{children:"Docker Compose"})," — Manages multi-container Docker applications."]}),"
"]}),"

title: PIERO Master Orchestration Agent
excerpt: The core runtime daemon responsible for host-level security orchestration, dynamic eBPF driver injection, PID self-immunity enforcement, and real-time cognitive system intelligence analysis.

items.title: 2. Kernel Memory Hygiene & eBPF Recovery Layer

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const a={a:"a",code:"code",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(a.h1,{id:"piero-master-orchestration-agent",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-master-orchestration-agent",children:"PIERO Master Orchestration Agent"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["PIERO Master Orchestration Agent (",n(a.code,{children:"piero-agent"}),") serves as the fundamental runtime core daemon and security anchor for the entire PIERO LOKA architecture stack."]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"As a frontline execution engine, the agent operates as a high-performance binary responsible for managing host kernel privileges, dynamically injecting more than 32 eBPF/XDP sensor drivers, and synthesizing multi-vector decision logic in real time. This design enables a low-level active defense system with strong isolation guarantees and self-protection capabilities."}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"core-mechanisms--feature-breakdown",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-mechanisms--feature-breakdown",children:"Core Mechanisms & Feature Breakdown"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"1-self-immunity-protection-cache",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-self-immunity-protection-cache",children:"1. Self-Immunity Protection Cache"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Prevents self-inflicted failures where the security agent could inadvertently block or interfere with its own execution (feedback loop protection)."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Bootstrapped PID Locking"}),": The agent initializes by securing its own process identifier (PID) before loading any kernel-level sensors."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Dynamic Allowlist Registry"}),": Automatically registers the daemon PID, active threads, and parent process IDs into an eBPF kernel-level immunity map, ensuring internal traffic bypasses enforcement rules safely."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Self-Protection Isolation Layer"}),": Guarantees that internal telemetry and control flows remain unaffected by security filters."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"2-kernel-memory-hygiene--ebpf-recovery-layer",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-kernel-memory-hygiene--ebpf-recovery-layer",children:"2. Kernel Memory Hygiene & eBPF Recovery Layer"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Maintains host stability by cleaning residual state from previous or corrupted runtime sessions."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel State Reconciliation"}),": Executes full map-clear routines during bootstrap to ensure clean enforcement tables inside the kernel space."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"XDP Attachment Cleanup"}),": Detects and safely detaches stale XDP programs from network interfaces before deploying new high-performance packet processing pipelines."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Runtime Consistency Enforcement"}),": Prevents accumulation of orphaned kernel hooks that could degrade system performance or stability."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"3-multi-vector-cognitive-decision-backbone",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-multi-vector-cognitive-decision-backbone",children:"3. Multi-Vector Cognitive Decision Backbone"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The orchestration layer fuses multiple analytical models to derive precise security decisions in real time."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"OPA/Rego Policy Engine"}),": Evaluates dynamic compliance rules using declarative policy definitions for runtime enforcement decisions."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Behavioral Deviation Profiler"}),": Detects anomalous binary execution patterns using ultra-fast LRU-based behavioral caching mechanisms."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Trust Decay System"}),": Applies atomic trust score degradation every 10 seconds, ensuring risk scores naturally decay when anomalous behavior subsides."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"4-software-supply-chain-audit-sbom--osv",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-software-supply-chain-audit-sbom--osv",children:"4. Software Supply Chain Audit (SBOM & OSV)"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Provides continuous visibility into software integrity and dependency vulnerability exposure."}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"SBOM Generation Pipeline"}),": Periodically constructs a complete Software Bill of Materials in SPDX JSON format covering all host dependencies."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Continuous OSV Scanning"}),": Matches package fingerprints against Open Source Vulnerabilities (OSV) databases to detect outdated or vulnerable libraries in real time."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Dependency Risk Tracking"}),": Maintains a live security posture map of all runtime components."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"technology-stack",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#technology-stack",children:"Technology Stack"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Programming Language"}),": Rust (Edition 2024) with memory-safe systems design"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel Instrumentation"}),": eBPF & XDP high-performance packet processing drivers"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Policy Engine"}),": Open Policy Agent (OPA) with Rego policy language"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Communication Protocol"}),": Low-latency gRPC telemetry synchronization"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"System Integration"}),": systemd watchdog for high-availability daemon supervision"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"operational-dashboard",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#operational-dashboard",children:"Operational Dashboard"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"piero-agent-control-interface",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-agent-control-interface",children:"PIERO Agent Control Interface"})}),"
",n("img",{src:"/portofolio/PieroLokaRust/PieroAgent.png",alt:"PIERO Master Agent Dashboard"})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: PIERO Cloud Provider Emulator
excerpt: A high-fidelity offline cloud infrastructure simulation engine supporting JSON/CBOR/query protocol parsing for enforcing distributed transaction workflows and security operations testing.

items.title: 3. High-Performance Memory Store & Persistent State Engine

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const t={a:"a",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(t.h1,{id:"piero-cloud-provider-emulator",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-cloud-provider-emulator",children:"PIERO Cloud Provider Emulator"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"PIERO Cloud Provider Emulator is a high-fidelity cloud infrastructure simulation engine that operates entirely in an offline local environment."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"It is designed to validate cross-plane enforcement workflows and distributed transaction sagas, enabling comprehensive testing of security mitigation actions—such as emergency IAM token revocation, encryption key suspension, or storage volume snapshotting—without requiring interaction with any public cloud provider."}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"core-features--technical-capabilities",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-features--technical-capabilities",children:"Core Features & Technical Capabilities"})}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"1-polyglot-cloud-protocol-decoder",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-polyglot-cloud-protocol-decoder",children:"1. Polyglot Cloud Protocol Decoder"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"To ensure full compatibility with modern cloud SDKs and legacy interfaces, the emulator includes a multi-protocol decoding system."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Query Protocol Decoder"}),": Parses legacy XML-based queries and form-encoded POST requests commonly used in older authentication systems."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"REST JSON Decoder"}),": Efficiently processes modern RESTful API payloads with structured JSON schemas."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Binary CBOR Decoder"}),": Supports Concise Binary Object Representation for high-performance binary serialization and compact cloud-native communication formats."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"2-local-security-mitigation-simulation-layer",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-local-security-mitigation-simulation-layer",children:"2. Local Security Mitigation Simulation Layer"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The system mirrors real-world cloud provider mitigation behaviors for controlled testing and validation."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Identity Management Simulation"}),": Emulates immediate revocation of compromised session credentials at the authorization layer."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Compute Isolation Emulation"}),": Simulates workload isolation actions such as VM containment, container shutdown, and orchestration-level service segmentation."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Resource Suspension Modeling"}),": Tests behaviors such as cryptographic key suspension and distributed storage bucket lockdown scenarios."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"3-high-performance-memory-store--persistent-state-engine",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-high-performance-memory-store--persistent-state-engine",children:"3. High-Performance Memory Store & Persistent State Engine"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The emulator maintains a fast in-memory state system with deterministic persistence guarantees."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Atomic State Synchronization"}),": Every simulated infrastructure change is immediately reflected in an in-memory atomic state graph."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Automated Snapshot Persistence"}),": Periodic disk snapshots ensure durability of simulated cloud state across runtime restarts."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Low-Latency State Queries"}),": Optimized for fast inspection of large-scale simulated infrastructure graphs."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"4-synthetic-telemetry-generation-engine",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-synthetic-telemetry-generation-engine",children:"4. Synthetic Telemetry Generation Engine"})}),"

items.title: 2. Global Incident Control & Atomic Response Coordination

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const t={a:"a",code:"code",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(t.h1,{id:"piero-central-operations-control-plane",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-central-operations-control-plane",children:"PIERO Central Operations Control Plane"})}),"

",i(t.p,{children:["As the primary ",n(t.strong,{children:"Control Plane layer"}),", the system is built using the asynchronous ",n(t.strong,{children:"Axum web framework"})," on top of the Tokio runtime, backed by an embedded ",n(t.strong,{children:"SQLite"})," persistence layer. It serves as a robust administrative gateway for managing incident response lifecycles while preserving strict abstraction of internal infrastructure topology."]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"

",n(t.p,{children:"The system enforces mandatory human validation for all high-impact or destructive security operations."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Atomic Approval Queue"}),": High-risk enforcement actions are safely queued into durable storage before execution, ensuring deterministic processing."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Non-Repudiation Ledger"}),": All operator actions are cryptographically signed using Ed25519 keys, creating tamper-resistant audit trails suitable for compliance and forensic analysis."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Manual Gate Enforcement"}),": Prevents autonomous execution of sensitive system-wide operations without explicit operator authorization."]}),"
"]}),"

",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"One-Click Posture Transition"}),": Allows rapid system-wide state changes such as switching to containment mode during critical incidents."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Atomic Incident Propagation"}),": Ensures consistent incident state distribution across all nodes with minimal propagation delay."]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Coordinated Defense Execution"}),": Synchronizes enforcement policies across the entire infrastructure fleet in real time."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.hr,{}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"3-spiffe-based-operator-risk-analytics",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-spiffe-based-operator-risk-analytics",children:"3. SPIFFE-Based Operator Risk Analytics"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"To mitigate insider threats and credential compromise scenarios, operator identity is continuously validated and analyzed."}),"

title: PIERO Safety Controller
excerpt: A distributed security authorization system powered by Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT), OpenRaft consensus, and cryptographic quorum validation for critical infrastructure protection.

",n(t.p,{children:"The system is designed to ensure that critical enforcement actions — such as mass process termination, workload isolation, or runtime quarantine operations — can only be executed through cryptographically verified cluster-wide consensus. This architecture protects the infrastructure against split-brain scenarios, compromised control-plane agents, and unauthorized unilateral enforcement attempts without exposing internal physical topology details publicly."}),"

",i(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Bidirectional TLS Streaming"}),": All inter-node communication channels are fully encrypted using mutual TLS authentication."]}),"

Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) & Ed25519 Cryptographic Verification"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The controller is hardened against partial node compromise, malicious actors, and inconsistent cluster behavior."}),"
",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:["
",i(t.p,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Multi-Signature Authorization Validation"}),": Critical security actions require approval from a minimum quorum of ",n(t.strong,{children:"2f + 1"})," cryptographically trusted active nodes before execution."]}),"
"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:["
",i(t.p,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Ed25519 Signature Verification"}),": Every enforcement decision is digitally signed and verified using high-performance Ed25519 cryptographic primitives."]}),"

",i(t.ul,{children:["
",i(t.li,{children:["
",i(t.p,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Consensus-Based State Management"}),": All enforcement operations are committed through replicated distributed logs before action tokens are released to runtime agents."]}),"
"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:["
",i(t.p,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Partition Tolerance"}),": Maintains operational consistency during network partitions and degraded infrastructure conditions."]}),"
"]}),"
",i(t.li,{children:["
",i(t.p,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Immutable Security Journaling"}),": Every security decision is durably persisted within the consensus log for auditability and forensic reconstruction."]}),"

title: PIERO LOKA - Kernel-Level Security & FinOps
excerpt: Platform pemantauan keamanan dan FinOps performa tinggi berbasis eBPF dengan arsitektur Core Dispatcher untuk visibilitas kernel mendalam.

items.title: 1. Real-Time FinOps and Distributed Cost Attribution

body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const a={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return i(e,{children:[n(a.h1,{id:"piero-loka",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#piero-loka",children:"PIERO LOKA"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.strong,{children:"Kernel-Level Security, FinOps, and Deep Observability via eBPF — Refactored"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"PIERO LOKA is a high-performance security and FinOps observability platform built with Go and eBPF. The system operates directly at the kernel level, providing high-fidelity system visibility with extremely low overhead (under 1.5%)."}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"consolidated-architecture-update",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#consolidated-architecture-update",children:"Consolidated Architecture Update"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["The latest architecture introduces a ",n(a.strong,{children:"Core Dispatcher"})," pattern that consolidates more than 28 kernel hooks into 6 high-performance kernel entry points. Using a zero-copy ring buffer design and internal event correlation, kernel overhead and context switching have been reduced by 60%–75%."]}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"core-dispatcher-capabilities",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#core-dispatcher-capabilities",children:"Core Dispatcher Capabilities"})}),"

",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Intelligent Module Masking"}),": Dynamically routes telemetry only to relevant security modules based on runtime context."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Business Context Enrichment"}),": Augments raw kernel signals with Kubernetes-aware metadata for immediate operational actionability."]}),"
"]}),"

"]}),"
"]}),"

"]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:["
",i(a.p,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Spending Spike Detection"}),": Uses a 60-second sliding window to detect anomalous compute cost surges."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"2-advanced-security-and-threat-detection",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-advanced-security-and-threat-detection",children:"2. Advanced Security and Threat Detection"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Proactive protection powered by 28 specialized eBPF modules covering more than 130 detection patterns mapped to the MITRE ATT&CK framework."}),"
",n(a.h4,{id:"security-module-coverage",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#security-module-coverage",children:"Security Module Coverage"})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Core Kernel Security Modules"}),": Runtime protection covering memory allocation, suspicious network activity, privilege escalation attempts (cgroup escapes), syscall monitoring, and process execution control."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Advanced Security Modules"}),": Detection of authentication exploits (PAM & sudo abuse), cryptographic integrity violations, hardware tampering (EFI/DMA attacks), TTY session attacks, GPU workload isolation, AI/ML data poisoning prevention, and Kubernetes/service mesh bypass attempts (Istio/Envoy)."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Self-Integrity Protection"}),": Defends the platform against kernel rootkits, unauthorized eBPF program replacement, and syscall table manipulation."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Observability & Compliance"}),": Produces forensic-grade audit trails for compliance requirements, including sensitive data loss prevention (DLP) for secrets such as AWS keys and PII, as well as GDPR-aligned auditing."]}),"
"]}),"

"]}),"

title: Point of sale GRPC
excerpt: A Point of sale example using Go, Sqlc, and Docker Compose.
body:
const{Fragment:a,jsx:n,jsxs:e}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",figure:"figure",h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return e(a,{children:[n(r.h1,{id:"-proyek-point-of-sale-pos-grpc",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#-proyek-point-of-sale-pos-grpc",children:"💳 Proyek Point of Sale (POS) gRPC"})}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Proyek ini merupakan ",n(r.strong,{children:"implementasi backend untuk sistem Point of Sale (POS)"})," yang dirancang dengan arsitektur ",n(r.strong,{children:"monolitik terstruktur"}),". Meskipun monolitik, proyek ini disusun dengan modul-modul yang jelas sehingga setiap domain (misalnya pengguna, merchant, inventaris, dan transaksi) tetap mudah dikelola serta memungkinkan pengembangan lebih lanjut tanpa kehilangan keteraturan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Tujuan utama dari proyek ini adalah untuk menghadirkan ",n(r.strong,{children:"fondasi kuat, aman, dan skalabel"})," bagi aplikasi kasir modern yang digunakan oleh berbagai jenis bisnis ritel. Dengan desain yang terstruktur, sistem mampu menangani kebutuhan kasir sehari-hari mulai dari pengelolaan pengguna, inventaris, hingga pencatatan transaksi penjualan, sambil tetap mudah di-deploy di berbagai lingkungan."]}),"
",e(r.p,{children:["Komunikasi antara klien dengan server dilakukan melalui ",n(r.strong,{children:"REST API"}),", sementara komunikasi internal antara API Gateway dan layanan utama menggunakan ",n(r.strong,{children:"gRPC"})," dengan ",n(r.strong,{children:"Protobuf"}),". Hal ini memastikan sistem memiliki ",n(r.strong,{children:"latensi rendah dan throughput tinggi"}),", sehingga tetap responsif meskipun menangani transaksi dalam jumlah besar. Data transaksi dan manajemen entitas disimpan dengan aman di dalam ",n(r.strong,{children:"PostgreSQL"}),", yang dikenal stabil dan handal untuk kebutuhan finansial serta operasional."]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"lingkup-dan-fungsi-utama",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#lingkup-dan-fungsi-utama",children:"Lingkup dan Fungsi Utama"})}),"
",e(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"🔐 Manajemen Pengguna & Peran"}),"
Sistem mendukung otentikasi dan otorisasi dengan level akses berbeda (admin, pemilik merchant, kasir). Hal ini memastikan hanya pihak berwenang yang dapat melakukan aksi tertentu sesuai tanggung jawabnya."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"🏬 Manajemen Merchant"}),"
Pemilik bisnis dapat mendaftarkan toko/merchant, mengatur informasi penting seperti nama toko, API key, hingga struktur operasional yang mereka miliki."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"👨‍💼 Manajemen Kasir"}),"
Merchant dapat menambahkan akun kasir, memberikan akses sesuai kebutuhan, serta memantau aktivitas kasir mereka secara langsung."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"📦 Manajemen Inventaris"}),"
Mendukung CRUD penuh terhadap produk dan kategori, mencakup detail stok, harga, deskripsi, hingga kategori produk. Dengan sistem ini, stok selalu up-to-date dan bisa dikontrol secara efisien."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"💳 Proses Transaksi"}),"
Sistem menyediakan alur lengkap untuk membuat pesanan, menambahkan item ke keranjang, menghitung total pembayaran, hingga mencatat transaksi secara permanen di database."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"⚡ Komunikasi gRPC Internal"}),"
API Gateway berkomunikasi dengan server utama melalui gRPC, yang memberikan performa tinggi serta mempermudah scaling di masa depan jika sistem ingin dipecah menjadi microservices."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"📖 Dokumentasi API Otomatis"}),"
REST API secara otomatis terdokumentasi dengan Swagger (",n(r.strong,{children:"Swago"}),"), sehingga memudahkan developer maupun tim integrasi untuk memahami dan menguji endpoint yang tersedia."]}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.li,{children:["
",e(r.p,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"🐳 Kontainerisasi dengan Docker"}),"
Sistem siap dijalankan pada lingkungan terisolasi dengan Docker & Docker Compose, membuat proses setup menjadi cepat, konsisten, dan mudah di-deploy di berbagai platform."]}),"
"]}),"
"]}),"

body:

The project is designed for researchers and engineers seeking a deep understanding of LLM internals without the overhead of massive frameworks."}),"
",n(a.hr,{}),"
